---
title: Just for Test22134
author: Zhiming Chen
date: '2026-04-10'
categories:
  - r
  - others
tags: [Quality, test]
cover:
    image: "images/color-aesthetics.jpg" # 放在 static/images/
    alt: "美学配图"
    relative: false
draft: false
---

# Just for Test256789

```{r}
x <- 1:10
y <- 1:10
plot(x,y)
```
